source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CONCOURSE

Concourse builds AI agents for corporate finance teams.

We connect core enterprise data sources and deploy AI agents that can analyze the data through natural language, deliver insights in seconds, and enable our customers to make better decisions. Since launching less than a year ago, Concourse has grown extremely rapidly. Our AI agents are deployed across hundreds of high-growth companies, unicorn startups like Persona, Front, Lightmatter, and large public companies - including multiple Fortune 500 customers.

Concourse is backed by Andreessen Horowitz, CRV, YC, Standard Capital, and 50+ angel investors from companies like OpenAI, Cursor, Vercel, Brex, Carta, Rippling, 1Password, Deel, Jeeves, and DoorDash.




ABOUT THE ROLE


We’re hiring a Technical Product Manager (Strategic Finance) who blends deep finance expertise with strong product intuition and technical fluency.

Your mission is to scale the impact of our AI agents across every finance team we serve. You’ll work directly with customers to understand their workflows, design product experiences that increase adoption, and build systems that ensure Concourse becomes core to their financial operations.

You'll work closely with our founders, engineering, and stay hands-on with SQL, integrations, and debugging, while thinking strategically about what unlocks customer value at scale. Your work will directly shape how we grow to thousands of customers and define how finance teams interact with AI & agents.

This is a high-impact role for someone who understands finance deeply, loves solving technical problems, and thrives at the intersection of product, data, and customer outcomes.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Optimize AI & Prompt Performance: Maintain prompt libraries, tune model configurations, and ensure high-quality outputs for finance use cases.

 - Solve Technical & Data Problems: Debug AI outputs, integration issues, and data inconsistencies through hands-on SQL, API investigation, and collaboration with engineering.

 - Build Analytics & Insights: Create dashboards and analytics that reveal customer behavior, product usage patterns, and revenue expansion opportunities.

 - Inform GTM Strategy: Identify patterns across customers to refine positioning, messaging, onboarding playbooks, and expansion strategies.

 - Design High-Impact Customer Journeys: Optimize onboarding, training, and lifecycle experiences that help finance teams reach first value faster and become long-term power users

 - Build Customer Health Frameworks: Develop systems for segmentation, health scoring, expansion signals, and proactive account insights.

 - Translate Customer Needs Into Product Requirements: Partner closely with engineering to scope features, refine requirements, and shape product direction with clarity and precision.

 - Architect Finance System Integrations: Work across ERPs, banks, CRMs, HRIS tools, and custom databases to design scalable agent capabilities and prompts




ABOUT YOU

 - 2-6 years in consulting, strategic finance, FP&A, finance operations, or data and systems roles supporting finance teams

 - Deep understanding of financial statements, accounting principles, and how finance teams operate, and the workflows they perform

 - Proficient in SQL, comfortable writing queries for analysis, debugging issues, and working with customer data

 - Familiarity with BI tools (Looker, Tableau, PowerBI) and data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Postgres, etc.)

 - Excellent communicator who builds trust with C-level finance executives and translates feedback into product clarity

 - Experience with finance systems (QBO, Ramp, NetSuite, Intacct, Oracle, SAP, Salesforce, etc.) and relevant finance tasks that pull from these systems

 - Thrives in fast-paced, ambiguous environments and is able to self-direct, move quickly, and operate with high ownership in a startup setting

 - Experience with LLMs, prompt engineering, or tuning AI outputs for analytical or o

source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CONCOURSE

Concourse builds AI agents for corporate finance teams.

We connect core enterprise data sources and deploy AI agents that can analyze the data through natural language, deliver insights in seconds, and enable our customers to make better decisions. Since launching less than a year ago, Concourse has grown extremely rapidly. Our AI agents are deployed across hundreds of high-growth companies, unicorn startups like Persona, Front, Lightmatter, and large public companies - including multiple Fortune 500 customers.

Concourse is backed by Andreessen Horowitz, CRV, YC, Standard Capital, and 50+ angel investors from companies like OpenAI, Cursor, Vercel, Brex, Carta, Rippling, 1Password, Deel, Jeeves, and DoorDash.




ABOUT THE ROLE


We’re hiring a software engineer to build and scale the core infrastructure that powers our AI agents. You’ll work across APIs, data models, integrations, and backend systems that handle high-volume queries and critical finance workflows.

Your mission is to build reliable, scalable backend systems that enable our AI agents to deliver fast, accurate, and trustworthy results for enterprise customers. You’ll develop new features, expand integrations, optimize performance, and contribute to the architecture that supports hundreds of thousands of AI-driven queries per month.

This is a high-impact role for someone who loves building backend systems, enjoys solving complex data and integration challenges, and wants to grow quickly inside a fast-moving startup.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Build Core Backend Systems: Develop and maintain backend features, APIs, and business logic that power our AI agents and user-facing applications.

 - Own Integrations: Build integrations with ERPs, banks, CRMs, HRIS, payroll, billing systems, and other finance data sources.

 - Create ETL Pipelines: Develop and maintain ETL processes that ensure smooth, reliable data flow from external systems into our database.

 - Optimize Backend for Scale: Work with the AI team to ensure backend systems support high-volume AI queries with strong performance and reliability.

 - Take Ownership of Product Components: Own large areas of the backend with a high degree of autonomy and an ownership mentality.





ABOUT YOU

 - 2+ years of backend engineering experience delivering production systems and features

 - Strong experience building REST APIs, working with databases, and developing backend services (TypeScript/Node.js preferred)

 - Comfortable building integrations, reading API documentation quickly, and connecting disparate systems with urgency

 - Strong understanding of data modeling, schema design, and moving data across siloed systems

 - Excellent problem solver who enjoys debugging, prototyping, and thinking creatively through technical challenges

 - Thrives in fast-paced, ambiguous environments and is able to self-direct, move quickly, and operate with high ownership in a startup setting

 - Experience with financial systems (ERPs, billing, payroll, or other systems) or fintech products (preferred but not required)

 - Experience with data warehouses (Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery), ETL tools (Fivetran, Airbyte)






WHY YOU SHOULD JOIN US


Joining Concourse is an incredible opportunity to get in at the ground level of a high-growth, category-defining AI company. Every person we hire meaningfully shapes the product, culture, and trajectory of the business, and we compensate accordingly with top-of-market salary and equity.

You’ll have a high degree of ownership from day one. We move fast, build aggressively, and operate with very little bureaucracy. You’ll work directly with the founders and founding team, ship impactful work weekly, and play a core role in scaling the company.

We’re in person 5 days a week in our new NYC HQ in Flatiron, where we collaborate tightly, iterate quickly, and build an environment that’s both high-energy and deeply focused. We believe the best work, and the fastest learn

source_jobs.title: GTM Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CONCOURSE

Concourse builds AI agents for corporate finance teams.

We connect core enterprise data sources and deploy AI agents that can analyze the data through natural language, deliver insights in seconds, and enable our customers to make better decisions. Since launching less than a year ago, Concourse has grown extremely rapidly. Our AI agents are deployed across hundreds of high-growth companies, unicorn startups like Persona, Front, Lightmatter, and large public companies - including multiple Fortune 500 customers.

Concourse is backed by Andreessen Horowitz, CRV, YC, Standard Capital, and 50+ angel investors from companies like OpenAI, Cursor, Vercel, Brex, Carta, Rippling, 1Password, Deel, Jeeves, and DoorDash.




ABOUT THE ROLE


We’re hiring a GTM Engineer who blends engineering skill with growth instincts and a strong bias for building leverage.

Your mission is to help Concourse increase sales velocity by building and shipping solutions to close more deals, accelerate sales cycles, and scale our pipeline and reach.

You’ll work directly with the CEO to create AI-driven playbooks and solutions as well as build internal agents, creating demos, automating outbound, generating technical content, and jumping into high-priority customer conversations when needed.

This role is perfect for builders who love shipping scrappy technical solutions, enjoy working directly with customers, and want to sit at the intersection of engineering, growth, and sales.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Generate More Pipeline: Build AI SDRs, outbound engines, automated content workflows, and technical growth hacks that create and qualify opportunities at scale.

 - Build High-Impact Demos: Create interactive, magical demo environments, templates, and live workflows that impress prospects and differentiate Concourse.

 - Accelerate Sales Cycles: Develop internal agents and automation that prep account research, personalize collateral, generate content, and shorten time-to-close.

 - Join Key Customer Conversations: Run technical demos, unblock integrations, answer deep technical questions, and help bring strategic deals across the finish line.

 - Ship Experiments Across the GTM Surface Area: Run SEO/AEO experiments, launch marketing content, prototype new onboarding flows, and support product-led growth motions.

 - Create Reusable Sales Assets: Build POC templates, sample data environments, architecture diagrams, and customer-facing resources that enable the GTM team to operate at 10x speed.

 - Influence Product Through Customer Insights: Surface recurring patterns, gaps, and opportunities from customer interactions and feed them directly into product and engineering decisions.
   
   


ABOUT YOU

 - 2+ years of technical experience in engineering, growth engineering, sales engineering, solutions architecture, or another technical role with customer exposure

 - Comfortable writing code (Python, JavaScript, etc.) to build internal tools, automations, and lightweight systems; strong with SQL, APIs, debugging, and solving technical problems in real time

 - A growth-minded builder who thinks strategically about scaling, automation, and creative customer acquisition in an AI-first world

 - Excellent communicator who can explain complex concepts simply, create compelling demos, and collaborate closely with GTM and engineering

 - Bias toward action where you love to move fast, self-direct, prioritize high-impact work, and thrive in high-velocity environments

 - Familiarity with finance systems, finance workflows, CFO stakeholders, and our buyer personas (preferred but not required)

 - Familiarity with B2B SaaS and fintech GTM motions, with ideas and taste for what excellent execution looks like in B2B (preferred but not required)





WHY YOU SHOULD JOIN US


Joining Concourse is an incredible opportunity to get in at the ground level of a high-growth, category-defining AI company. Every person we hire meaningfully shapes the product

source_jobs.title: Create your own role
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CONCOURSE

Concourse builds AI agents for corporate finance teams.

We connect core enterprise data sources and deploy AI agents that can analyze the data through natural language, deliver insights in seconds, and enable our customers to make better decisions. Since launching less than a year ago, Concourse has grown extremely rapidly. Our AI agents are deployed across hundreds of high-growth companies, unicorn startups like Persona, Front, Lightmatter, and large public companies - including multiple Fortune 500 customers.

Concourse is backed by Andreessen Horowitz, CRV, YC, Standard Capital, and 50+ angel investors from companies like OpenAI, Cursor, Vercel, Brex, Carta, Rippling, 1Password, Deel, Jeeves, and DoorDash.




DON'T SEE YOUR ROLE? LET'S TALK.



We're always looking for exceptional people who want to help build Concourse. If you don't see a role that fits but believe you can make a significant impact on our team, we want to hear from you!

We're particularly interested in people with expertise in finance, engineering, AI/LLM development, product, sales, operations, or growth. We love working with experienced operators, technical specialists, previous founders, future founders, or builders with a unique skill set that could help us scale.

Concourse is transforming how companies interact with financial data, and if you think your experience and skillset can help us achieve this mission, we would love to hear from you.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - High ownership mentality: You've started a company, been an early employee, or want to someday. You operate independently and take full ownership of outcomes.

 - Relevant expertise: You bring deep experience in an area that could add significant value to Concourse—whether that's technical, operational, or domain-specific.

 - Startup mentality: You thrive in fast-paced, ambiguous environments. You're scrappy, resourceful, and comfortable figuring things out as you go.

 - Drive and passion: You want to do some of the best work of your career and have the energy to crush goals in a small, high-performing team.






WHY YOU SHOULD JOIN US


Joining Concourse is an incredible opportunity to get in at the ground level of a high-growth, category-defining AI company. Every person we hire meaningfully shapes the product, culture, and trajectory of the business, and we compensate accordingly with top-of-market salary and equity.

You’ll have a high degree of ownership from day one. We move fast, build aggressively, and operate with very little bureaucracy. You’ll work directly with the founders and founding team, ship impactful work weekly, and play a core role in scaling the company.

We’re in person 5 days a week in our new NYC HQ in Flatiron, where we collaborate tightly, iterate quickly, and build an environment that’s both high-energy and deeply focused. We believe the best work, and the fastest learnings, happen together.

We care about your growth. You’ll get direct mentorship, opportunities to stretch into new skills across engineering, AI, and GTM, and the support of a team that wants you to succeed. This is a place to accelerate your career, build your brand, and make an outsized impact.

source_jobs.title: Founding Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CONCOURSE

Concourse builds AI agents for corporate finance teams.

We connect core enterprise data sources and deploy AI agents that can analyze the data through natural language, deliver insights in seconds, and enable our customers to make better decisions. Since launching less than a year ago, Concourse has grown extremely rapidly. Our AI agents are deployed across hundreds of high-growth companies, unicorn startups like Persona, Front, Lightmatter, and large public companies - including multiple Fortune 500 customers.

Concourse is backed by Andreessen Horowitz, CRV, YC, Standard Capital, and 50+ angel investors from companies like OpenAI, Cursor, Vercel, Brex, Carta, Rippling, 1Password, Deel, Jeeves, and DoorDash.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re hiring our first Account Executive to help shape how Concourse goes to market.

Your mission is to drive revenue growth by building strategic relationships with customers to onboard and scale Concourse's impact. You’ll work with finance teams and CFOs and cover the full spectrum, from fast‑growing mid‑market to the world’s largest enterprises.

You’ll own the full cycle, from first touch to close, and you’ll work closely with founders, CEO, to build on to build on top of our fast growth & traction a repeatable motion that scales. As a founding AE, you won’t just sell Concourse; you’ll help build the systems, assets, and playbooks that define how we tell our story and win customers.

This is a high-impact role for someone who loves selling, thrives in zero-to-one environments, and wants to shape the core revenue function of a category-defining AI company.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own the Sales Journey: Take prospective finance teams from discovery, through pilot, negotiation, and to a successful first deal that sets a foundation for long-term partnerships.

 - Navigate Complex Enterprise Environments: Manage procurement, contracts, integrations and multi-stakeholder decision cycles that large teams require.

 - Adapt the GTM Scalability Framework: Work with the founders to build scalable infrastructure from CRM workflows, sales tools, demo scripts, qualification frameworks, and renewal/expansion playbooks.

 - Partner with Buyers at Every Level: Engage CFOs, controllers, FP&A heads and other finance operations leaders; translate Concourse’s value into business metrics they care about.

 - Drive Expansion & Reference Value: After initial wins, help establish those customers as reference cases and design mechanisms for upsell, multi-thread engagement, and expansion.

 - Feed Insights Back Into Product & GTM: Capture customer feedback, objections, feature requests, and workflow patterns and help shape how Concourse evolves.





ABOUT YOU

 - 4+ years of experience running full-cycle B2B SaaS deals, with a track record of consistent quota attainment.

 - Exceptionally strong in discovery, asking sharp questions that surface real pain and map directly to value.

 - Clear, concise communicator who can speak credibly with CFOs, controllers, FP&A leaders, operators, and can translate technical/AI-driven value into business outcomes.

 - Have a founder-like mindset where you enthe joy building process, writing your own playbooks, and shaping how a GTM motion scales

 - Scrappy & full of ideas that can thrive in environments that are fast, ambiguous, and require high ownership.

 - Familiarity with finance systems, workflows, and how finance teams operate (preferred but not required)

 - Experience in fintech selling, enterprise data-SaaS selling (preferred but not required)

 - Experience as an early GTM hire or building GTM infrastructure (preferred but not required)




WHY YOU SHOULD JOIN US


Joining Concourse is an incredible opportunity to get in at the ground level of a high-growth, category-defining AI company. Every person we hire meaningfully shapes the product, culture, and trajectory of the business, and we compensate accordingly with top-of-market salary and equity.

You

source_jobs.title: Growth Lead
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CONCOURSE

Concourse builds AI agents for corporate finance teams.

We connect core enterprise data sources and deploy AI agents that can analyze the data through natural language, deliver insights in seconds, and enable our customers to make better decisions. Since launching less than a year ago, Concourse has grown extremely rapidly. Our AI agents are deployed across hundreds of high-growth companies, unicorn startups like Persona, Front, Lightmatter, and large public companies - including multiple Fortune 500 customers.

Concourse is backed by Andreessen Horowitz, CRV, YC, Standard Capital, and 50+ angel investors from companies like OpenAI, Cursor, Vercel, Brex, Carta, Rippling, 1Password, Deel, Jeeves, and DoorDash.




ABOUT THE ROLE


We’re hiring a Growth lead to help Concourse expand its reach, strengthen our brand, and scale our inbound and self-serve motion.

Your mission is to increase Concourse’s visibility, generate inbound demand, and build the programs, content, community, and distribution loops that multiply our reach.

You’ll blend creativity with analytical rigor through running campaigns, experimenting with new channels, building community touchpoints, orchestrating events and dinners, improving SEO/AEO, developing referral loops, and launching ideas that help Concourse stand out in the AI + finance landscape.

This is a high-impact role for someone who loves storytelling, user acquisition, growth experiments, and building the foundation of a world-class GTM engine from the ground up.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own SEO / AEO Strategy and Execution: Improve organic search rankings, optimize for AI search/discovery surfaces, and build Concourse’s long-term discoverability.

 - Run Experiments Across the Growth Stack: Test new campaigns, ideas, partnerships, landing pages, content experiments, viral hooks, outbound messaging, and distribution hacks that accelerate adoption.

 - Build Community & Events: Organize dinners, roundtables, gatherings, and micro-communities that deepen Concourse’s presence across finance, operations, and AI ecosystems.

 - Create Compelling Content: Work with founders and GTM to produce high-quality content: case studies, analysis, product updates, playbooks, newsletters, social content, and thought leadership.

 - Develop Concourse’s Brand & Narrative: Help articulate how AI agents transform finance teams and evangelize Concourse across channels, communities, and customer conversations.

 - Partner Across GTM: Collaborate with sales and product to design activation flows, improve conversion, and build compelling evaluation journeys.




ABOUT YOU

 - 4+ years in growth, marketing, product marketing, or GTM roles at fast-moving startups

 - Strong experience running experiments, optimizing funnels, and scaling acquisition channels

 - Excellent storyteller who can distill complex concepts into clear, compelling narratives

 - Comfortable owning SEO, AEO, content, and organic acquisition strategies

 - A creator at heart, you enjoy producing content, designing campaigns, and engaging with customers

 - Event-first mindset, who is excited to run dinners, roundtables, and community programming

 - Comfortable with technical & AI tools and thinks automation & agents first to scale our GTM operations and lead generation in a lean and AI native way

 - Thrives in fast-paced, ambiguous environments and operates with high ownership

 - Experience in fintech, B2B SaaS, or selling to finance audiences (preferred but not required)

 - Experience launching 0 to 1 growth motions or self-serve flows (preferred but not required)






WHY YOU SHOULD JOIN US


Joining Concourse is an incredible opportunity to get in at the ground level of a high-growth, category-defining AI company. Every person we hire meaningfully shapes the product, culture, and trajectory of the business, and we compensate accordingly with top-of-market salary and equity.

You’ll have a high degree of ownership from day

source_jobs.title: Strategy & Operations
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CONCOURSE

Concourse builds AI agents for corporate finance teams.

We connect core enterprise data sources and deploy AI agents that can analyze the data through natural language, deliver insights in seconds, and enable our customers to make better decisions. Since launching less than a year ago, Concourse has grown extremely rapidly. Our AI agents are deployed across hundreds of high-growth companies, unicorn startups like Persona, Front, Lightmatter, and large public companies - including multiple Fortune 500 customers.

Concourse is backed by Andreessen Horowitz, CRV, YC, Standard Capital, and 50+ angel investors from companies like OpenAI, Cursor, Vercel, Brex, Carta, Rippling, 1Password, Deel, Jeeves, and DoorDash.




ABOUT THE ROLE


We're hiring a Founding Strategy & Operations hire to help build the operational and go-to-market foundation of Concourse from the ground up.

This isn't a support role. You'll own critical functions, build systems that scale, and drive execution across GTM, operations, and strategy — working closely with the founders and broader team to move fast and win. You'll be one of our earliest operational hires, which means what you build now will shape how Concourse operates for years to come.

On day one, your biggest focus will be GTM and growth — helping drive inbound demand, sharpen our go-to-market motion, and build the systems that accelerate revenue. Over time, you'll expand into owning operational infrastructure, strategic initiatives, and whatever the company needs most.

If you're early in your career, deeply execution-oriented, and want to build something real from scratch at one of the fastest growing companies in the US. This is the role for you.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES


 - GTM & Growth (Day 1 Focus)
   
   - Work directly with the founders to accelerate our go-to-market motion — from outbound campaigns and pipeline building to partnerships, content, and distribution
   
   - Help design and run growth experiments across channels, messaging, and activation flows
   
   - Own and coordinate events, dinners, roundtables, and community touchpoints that deepen Concourse's presence in finance, operations, and AI ecosystems
   
   - Support the development of compelling narratives, decks, and materials that resonate with prospects, customers, and partners
   
   Strategy & Operations
   
   - Design and build the operational systems, processes, and infrastructure that let Concourse scale without breaking — meeting cadences, cross-functional workflows, internal tooling, and reporting
   
   - Own key strategic initiatives end-to-end, from scoping and planning through to execution and measurement
   
   - Identify inefficiencies and gaps across the business and drive them to resolution — fast
   
   - Track the most important things happening across the company and make sure nothing falls through the cracks
   
   Company Building
   
   - Support recruiting coordination, candidate experience, and onboarding as the team scales
   
   - Help shape the culture, rituals, and ways of working that define Concourse as a company
   
   - Act as an owner, not a coordinator — you'll have real scope, real accountability, and real impact from week one




ABOUT YOU


 - 2–5 years of experience in consulting, investment banking, finance, operations, BizOps, or a prior strategy & operations role — ex-founders and ex-PMs welcome

 - Proficient with AI and vibe coding. You love to vibe code and think automation and agents first, and you're excited to use new tooling to work faster and smarter

 - Hungry, highly resourceful, and wired to figure things out. You don't wait to be told what to do and love driving results

 - Exceptional attention to detail with the ability to manage multiple workstreams simultaneously without dropping the ball

 - Strong communicator who can write a crisp email, run a tight meeting, and distill a complex idea into a clear narrative

 - A builder at heart. You get energy

source_jobs.title: Founding Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CONCOURSE

Concourse builds AI agents for corporate finance teams.

We connect core enterprise data sources and deploy AI agents that can analyze the data through natural language, deliver insights in seconds, and enable our customers to make better decisions. Since launching less than a year ago, Concourse has grown extremely rapidly. Our AI agents are deployed across hundreds of high-growth companies, unicorn startups like Persona, Front, Lightmatter, and large public companies - including multiple Fortune 500 customers.

Concourse is backed by Andreessen Horowitz, CRV, YC, Standard Capital, and 50+ angel investors from companies like OpenAI, Cursor, Vercel, Brex, Carta, Rippling, 1Password, Deel, Jeeves, and DoorDash.



ABOUT THE ROLE


We're hiring a Founding Designer, the person who will own and elevate how Concourse looks, feels, and works for the finance teams that rely on it every day.

You'll join a team that already ships great product and cares deeply about design, and you'll raise the bar across every surface. Working directly with our founders, designers, and engineers, you'll take our product experience and visual identity to the next level, bringing sharper craft, stronger intuition, and real design leadership as we scale.

This is a high-ownership role. You'll drive design decisions, shape the product, and define what Concourse looks like as a company, not just execute on someone else's vision. If you're a strong, hungry designer who wants to lead, grow fast, and do the best work of your career; this is your seat.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES


 - Product Design
   
   - Own the end-to-end product design process — from early concept and user flows through wireframes, high-fidelity mockups, and polished final specs
   
   - Work closely with engineering and product to ship experiences that are fast, intuitive, and delightful — balancing craft with velocity
   
   - Contribute to and help evolve Concourse's design system in Figma, raising consistency and quality as the product grows
   
   - Translate complex financial data and AI-powered workflows into interfaces that feel simple and powerful for our users
   
   - Incorporate customer feedback and user research into design decisions continuously
   
   Brand & Visual Identity
   
   - Own Concourse's visual identity across key touchpoints — website, marketing assets, decks, social, and beyond
   
   - Design compelling materials that help prospects, customers, and investors understand and feel excited about what Concourse is building
   
   - Partner with GTM and founders to bring Concourse's brand narrative to life visually
   
   Design Leadership
   
   - Set a high design standard and be the person the team looks to for taste, quality, and creative direction
   
   - Move fast without sacrificing quality — you know when to go deep and when to ship
   
   - Help strengthen design culture and ways of working with engineering as the team grows




ABOUT YOU


 - 3-6 years of product design experience, ideally at a fast-moving startup or high-bar tech company

 - World-class Figma skills, working fast, staying organized, and producing specs that engineers love to build from

 - Strong product instincts, thinking about flows, edge cases, and user psychology, not just how things look

 - A portfolio that shows range: complex product UI, clean visual design, and an eye for detail that is immediately obvious

 - Hungry, opinionated, and high-ownership, excited to lead and elevate, not just execute

 - Comfortable working in ambiguity and energized by the opportunity to make a real mark on a product

 - Strong communicator who can articulate design decisions clearly to founders, engineers, and non-designers alike

 - Experience designing data-heavy or enterprise products (preferred but not required)

 - Comfortable technically or with vibe coding, the more technical the better (preferred but not required)





WHY YOU SHOULD JOIN US


Joining Concourse is an incr

notes: High-growth AI startup with strong engineering focus
